article.title: Content Marketing Strategy for Small Business - A 2026 Playbook That Works
article.body_markdown:
Most small businesses approach content marketing wrong. They write random articles with no strategy, publish inconsistently, and give up after two months.

Here is the 2026 playbook.

## 1. Pick 5 Keywords - Not 50

Trying to rank for everything is why most strategies fail. Pick 5 keywords your customers actually search. Write one article for each. Publish.

## 2. AI Draft + Human Edit

Use AI to draft in 60 seconds. Spend 5 minutes adding personal experience and real examples. A 3-hour task becomes 10 minutes.

## 3. Publish Twice a Week

Two 800-word articles per week beats one perfect 3000-word article per month. Google rewards recency and consistency.

## 4. Track and Double Down

After 60 days, check Search Console. Which articles get impressions? Write more on those topics.

I built [SEO Spark](https://seospark.net) to make content creation fast. 60 seconds from keyword to publish-ready. Free tier: 3 articles.
